scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.postinstall: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend test && cd backend && uv run pytest
